race.comment: CONTALDO (1) first run for the new yard covered ground from the sticky gate with a plugging fifth over 1600m at Taree. Placed at this trip and sure to be thereabouts. CASTELLE (9) five weeks between runs when back in trip for a plugging eighth over 1400m at Newcastle. Fitter now and back out to her right trip. Genuine contender who can bounce back. MORTLAKE (5) almost a month between runs when snagged back and failed to run on with a poor eighth over 1600m at Taree. Strips fitter and goes into the minor money. DUNDEE TALES (3) improving gelding starting to get up to his right distance range. Ran on late with a sound fourth over 1400m at Armidale. Good gate today and expect to see him a little closer to the speed. Keep safe.
